activities_projects.title: Transport Comparison Study
activities_projects.objective: Compare different modes of transport in India
steps: List roadways, railways, waterways and airways
Write advantages and disadvantages of each
Explain which is most suitable for long-distance transport
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops analytical understanding of transport systems
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of comparison and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Golden Quadrilateral Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of the Golden Quadrilateral highway network
steps: Locate Delhi, Mumbai, Chennai and Kolkata on the map
Trace the Golden Quadrilateral highway route
Write how it helps economic development

activities_projects.title: Railway Distribution Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Study the factors influencing railway distribution in India
steps: Identify areas with dense railway networks
Identify areas with sparse railway networks
Explain geographical reasons for these differences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns relationship between geography and transport

activities_projects.title: Pipeline Network Research
activities_projects.objective: Understand major pipeline routes in India
steps: Identify three major pipelines in India
Write their routes and states covered
Explain their economic importance

activities_projects.title: Major Ports Mapping
activities_projects.objective: Learn about India's major sea ports
steps: Locate Mumbai, Chennai, Vishakhapatnam, and Kochi ports
Write one important feature of each port
Explain their role in international trade

activities_projects.title: Air Transport Importance Study
activities_projects.objective: Examine the role of airways in connecting remote regions
steps: List advantages of air transport
Explain why it is important for the north-eastern region
Describe the role of regional connectivity schemes
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands strategic importance of air travel

activities_projects.title: Communication Network Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Study modern communication systems in India
steps: List personal and mass communication systems
Explain how communication supports economic growth
Give examples of modern communication technologies
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the role of communication in development

activities_projects.title: International Trade Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Understand export and import patterns of India
steps: List major export commodities of India
List major import commodities
Explain the concept of balance of trade with examples

activities_projects.title: Tourism and Economy Study
activities_projects.objective: Examine tourism as an economic activity
steps: Identify different types of tourism in India
Choose one tourist destination and describe it
Explain how tourism helps local economic development
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands tourism as a form of trade

activities_projects.title: Transport and Development Essay
activities_projects.objective: Understand why transport and communication are called lifelines of the economy
steps: List different means of transport and communication
Explain how they help movement of goods and people
Write a short essay on their role in national development
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops conceptual understanding of economic infrastructure
